case_title: ERDAL TANSEV VS. JACOB MOORE PERRIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT ERDAL TANSEV IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MIKE BROERMANN. DEFENDANTS/CROSS-CLAIMANTS JACOB MOORE PERRIN AND JESSE MOORE PERRIN ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVICE FEE $80. SERVED SEP-25-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TANSEV, ERDAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANSEV, ERDAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PERRIN, JACOB MOORE PERRIN, JESSE MOORE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF TANSEV, ERDAL
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PERRIN, JACOB MOORE PERRIN, JESSE MOORE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TANSEV, ERDAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
